creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: rakuco
Date: Fri Jan 15 14:49:58 UTC 2016
New revision: 406162
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/406162

Log:
  MFH: r406160

  Update to 0.9.5 and unbreak.

  - Switch MASTER_SITES to the project's SourceForge page. It only contains 0.9.5
    though.
  - Set LICENSE_FILE.
  - Switch to new style OPTIONS helpers.
  - Stop setting CFLAGS/CPPFLAGS, everything builds fine without those.

  PR:		205780
  Approved by:	maintainer timeout (bsam, 15 days)

  Approved by:	ports-secteam (feld)

Changes:
_U  branches/2016Q1/
  branches/2016Q1/graphics/yagf/Makefile
  branches/2016Q1/graphics/yagf/distinfo
